name: crsr
description: Terminal wrapper shell for Cursor Agent

scripts.package:linux: npm run bundle && mkdir -p release && pkg package.json --targets node18-linux-x64 --output release/crsr-linux-x64 --public-packages '*'
scripts.package:macos: npm run bundle && mkdir -p release && pkg package.json --targets node18-macos-x64,node18-macos-arm64 --out-path release --public-packages '*' && mv -f release/crsr-macos-arm64 release/crsr-macos-arm64 && mv -f release/crsr-macos-x64 release/crsr-macos-x64
scripts.package:windows: npm run bundle && mkdir -p release && pkg package.json --targets node18-win-x64 --output release/crsr-win-x64.exe --public-packages '*'
scripts.package:all: npm run package:linux && npm run package:macos && npm run package:windows
